description: Dependency rules for opiRunner pipeline execution - INDEPENDENT LAYER MODE

rules.name: FILE_EMISTI depends on FILE_UTILITY (same flow)
rules.description: FILE_EMISTI must wait for FILE_UTILITY completion of the same flow

rules.name: FILE_22000X depends on FILE_EMISTI (same flow)
rules.description: FILE_22000X must wait for FILE_EMISTI completion of the same flow

rules.name: ANASTI depends on FILE_UTILITY (same flow)
rules.description: RITENUTE ANASTI must wait for RITENUTE FILE_UTILITY completion

rules.name: RITENUTE FILE_22000X depends on ANASTI (same flow)
rules.description: RITENUTE FILE_22000X must wait for ANASTI completion

rules.name: LAYER FILE_UTILITY: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_UTILITY steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE1 waits for ORDINARIA

rules.name: LAYER FILE_UTILITY: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_UTILITY steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE2 waits for SPECIALE1

rules.name: LAYER FILE_UTILITY: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_UTILITY steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE3 waits for SPECIALE2

rules.name: LAYER FILE_EMISTI: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_EMISTI steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE1 waits for ORDINARIA

rules.name: LAYER FILE_EMISTI: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_EMISTI steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE2 waits for SPECIALE1

rules.name: LAYER FILE_EMISTI: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_EMISTI steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE3 waits for SPECIALE2

rules.name: LAYER FILE_22000X: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_22000X steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE1 waits for ORDINARIA

rules.name: LAYER FILE_22000X: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_22000X steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE2 waits for SPECIALE1

rules.name: LAYER FILE_22000X: Sequential execution only
rules.description: FILE_22000X steps execute sequentially - SPECIALE3 waits for SPECIALE2

rules.name: SINIIS depends on all FILE_22000X
rules.description: SINIIS must wait for all ORDINARIA and SPECIALE FILE_22000X completion

rules.name: LAYER FILE_UTILITY: RITENUTE waits for SPECIALE3
rules.description: RITENUTE FILE_UTILITY waits for SPECIALE3 FILE_UTILITY

rules.name: RITENUTE depends on SINIIS
rules.description: All RITENUTE transfer steps must wait for SINIIS completion

comments.mode: INDEPENDENT-LAYERS - Ogni layer ha la sua coda indipendente
comments.execution_pattern: I 3 layer (UTILITY, EMISTI, 22000X) procedono in parallelo, ognuno alla propria velocità
comments.example: Se UTILITY è veloce, può completare ORDINARIA→SPECIALE1→SPECIALE2→SPECIALE3 mentre EMISTI sta ancora facendo ORDINARIA
comments.layers_independent: UTILITY non aspetta EMISTI, EMISTI non aspetta 22000X (tranne per dipendenze interne al flusso)
comments.flow_names: Valid flow names: ORDINARIA, SPECIALE1, SPECIALE2, SPECIALE3, RITENUTE, SINIIS
comments.file_types: Valid file types: FILE_UTILITY, FILE_EMISTI, FILE_22000X, ANASTI, SINIIS
comments.same_rata: When true, dependency only applies to steps with the same RATA (e.g., 202503)
